prompt: Before user code sees an incoming request's parameters, the framework removes its own private, framework-only keys so they never leak into application logic. Where does it strip those private keys from a parsed parameter bag, and where does it do the same directly on a URL's search parameters?

evidence.claim: strips private keys from a parsed parameter bag
strips private keys from URL search params

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
